modelIdentification.name: JLVC-Base
modelIdentification.purpose: JLVC-Base provides base components neccessary in the JLVC federation.
modelIdentification.description: This FOM module contains the base components necessary for JLVC communication.
modelIdentification.useHistory: JLVC2024 - Draft 1 of JLVC Modular FOM.

JLVC2024 - JSJ7JLVC-21723: Update AppSpace enumerations for the human and nonhuman change to lifeform: Updated AppSpaceEnum16 values 10, 11, and 12. Fixed the order of enumerations 7 and 8. Fixed typo in the name of enumeration 51.
JLVC2024 - JSJ7JLVC-21615: Replace Additional Octet Datatypes: Remove OctetArray8, add simpleDataTypes for (Day, Hour, Minute), update DataTime to use the new datatypes.
JLVC2024 - Updated version number from 2024 to 2.
JLVC2024 - Version 4: Added effect enumeration to AppSpaceEnum16.
JLVC2025 - Version 5: Updated enumerations in AppSpaceEnum16 for align with CY25 appspace changes.

JLVC2025 - Version 6: Added REC_count attribute to FederateState and updated FederateState's semantics. Added appID_min and appID_max attributes to FederateState. Moved Area2DVariantStruct and associated dataTypes from JLVC-SIMAN. Added LatLongStruct64Array dataType. Updated PolygonGeometryStruct to use LatLongStruct64Array dataType. Updated RectangleGeometryStruct, CircleGeometryStruct, and EllipseGeometryStruct to use LatLongStruct64 dataType.

JLVC2025 - Version 7: Updated the order of dataType groupings in the module to be compliant with schema. Updated semantics for geometry struct dataTypes to remove geocentric wording and to specify that PolygonGeometryStruct's Point field has a minimum of three points. Replaced appID_man and appID_max with a new attribute AppIdRange. Created new fixed record datatype AppIdStruct for use by AppIdRange.
JLVC2025 - Version 8: Added new data type PercentInteger16.

JLVC2026 - Version 9: Updated the semantics of EllipseGeometryStruct:Orientation. Updated reference dependencies to use the new RPRv3 module names. Added RPR Enumerations module as a reference dependency.

reference.identification: SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Base FOM Module
SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Foundation FOM Module
SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Enumerations FOM Module

objectClass.name: FederateState
objectClass.semantics: Provides federate state information. While much of the information provided is static, attributes that do change shall update every 60 seconds. Additionally, some attributes shall update immediately upon change, as described in the attribute's semantics.

attribute.name: wmem_max
attribute.semantics: Kernel parameter (linux only).

attribute.name: RTI_version
attribute.semantics: RTI details for this executable

attribute.name: acceptTransfers
attribute.semantics: Flag indicating this federate can accept transfers.

attribute.name: build_OS_name
attribute.semantics: name of the OS (Linux, SGI, ...)

attribute.name: build_OS_version
attribute.semantics: OS version (5.0, 6.3, ...)

attribute.name: build_date
attribute.semantics: date federate was built/compiled

attribute.name: build_host
attribute.semantics: Hostname on machine it was built on

attribute.name: build_ip
attribute.semantics: IP address of the machine it was built on

attribute.name: build_version
attribute.semantics: version string for the build

attribute.name: federateIdentifier
attribute.semantics: Identifies the particular federate.

attribute.name: igmp_max_memberships
attribute.semantics: Kernel parameter (linux only).

attribute.name: image_size
attribute.semantics: size of the binary (in bytes)

attribute.name: load
attribute.semantics: Load for a given sim, 0 is idle, 1.0 is completely hosed. This attribute updates periodically and should be treated as a historical sample, rather than the current instantaneous value.

attribute.name: load_factor
attribute.semantics: loading factor for a given sim

attribute.name: local_vehicle_count
attribute.semantics: Number of local vehicles being published by this sim. A vehicle is considered to be an object that is being published in the Platform class. This attribute updates periodically and should be treated as a historical sample, rather than the current instantaneous value.

attribute.name: optmem_max
attribute.semantics: Kernel parameter (linux only).

attribute.name: provideTransfers
attribute.semantics: Flag indicating this federate can provide transfers.

attribute.name: remote_vehicle_count
attribute.semantics: Number of remote vehicles being reflected by this sim. A vehicle is considered to be an object that is being published in the Platform class. This attribute updates periodically and should be treated as a historical sample, rather than the current instantaneous value.

attribute.name: rmem_max
attribute.semantics: Kernel parameter (linux only).

attribute.name: run_OS_name
attribute.semantics: name of the OS (Linux, SGI, ...)

attribute.name: run_OS_version
attribute.semantics: OS version (5.0, 6.3, ...)

attribute.name: run_arch
attribute.semantics: Name of the processor

attribute.name: run_cmdline
attribute.semantics: command line used at startup

attribute.name: run_hostname
attribute.semantics: name of host running the app

attribute.name: run_ip
attribute.semantics: IP address of host running the app

attribute.name: run_processor_name
attribute.semantics: Name of the processor

attribute.name: run_processor_speed
attribute.semantics: Speed of the processor

attribute.name: run_ram_total
attribute.semantics: RAM (in bytes) installed on machine running the app

attribute.name: run_ram_used
attribute.semantics: RAM (in bytes) used on machine running the app. This attribute updates periodically and should be treated as a historical sample, rather than the current instantaneous value.

attribute.name: run_swap_total
attribute.semantics: Swap space (in MB) installed on machine running the app

attribute.name: run_terrain_name
attribute.semantics: terrain name

attribute.name: software_name
attribute.semantics: type of federate running

attribute.name: TransferHost
attribute.semantics: used to support non-RTI reliable ownership transfer

attribute.name: TransferPort
attribute.semantics: used to support non-RTI reliable ownership transfer

attribute.name: EarthGravityModel
attribute.semantics: Provides the earth gravity model being used by the federate.

attribute.name: ScenarioFiles
attribute.semantics: OPTIONAL. This attribute can share what scenario input files were used for a given simulation.

attribute.name: REC_count
attribute.semantics: Optional. Present for federates that support REC. The total active REC entities from the federate. This count shall update immediately upon change.

attribute.name: AppIdRange
attribute.semantics: Defines the range of application IDs reserved for the publishing federate. Federates may only publish objects containing Entity IDs with Application IDs contained within this range.

simpleData.name: LatitudeDegreesFloat64
simpleData.semantics: decimal degrees, north or south of the equator

simpleData.name: LengthMeterUnsignedInteger32
simpleData.semantics: Length in meters with integer representation

simpleData.name: LongitudeDegreesFloat64
simpleData.semantics: decimal degrees, east or west of the universal Prime Meridian

simpleData.name: Hour
simpleData.semantics: Time of day in hours. Range 0-23

simpleData.name: PercentInteger16
simpleData.semantics: Percentage. Can be a negative value.

enumeratedData.name: AppSpaceEnum16
enumeratedData.semantics: The application spaces used in the JLVC FOM

enumeratedData.name: FileTypeEnum8
enumeratedData.semantics: Enumerated list of file types. Used to support the FileType attribute in FileStruct

arrayData.name: LatLongStruct64Array
arrayData.semantics: Array of latitude/longitude pairs measured with 64 bit accuracy.

arrayData.name: LatLongStruct64Array1Plus
arrayData.semantics: One or more latitude/longitude pairs measured with 64 bit accuracy

arrayData.name: LVCID
arrayData.semantics: String of characters represented by an 11 element character string. An empty LVCID is represented by 11 ‘\0’ characters. See JLVC FIG Sections 4.11.1 and 4.11.3.

arrayData.name: UUID
arrayData.semantics: Aligning with NETN4 implementation. RFC 4122, section 4.1.2 using 16 bytes. Also referred to as Variant 1 or RFC 4122/DCE 1.1 UUIDs. For example, 00112233-4455-8877-6699-aabbccddeeff is encoded as the bytes 00 11 22 33 44 55 88 77 66 99 aa bb cc dd ee ff.

fixedRecordData.name: AppIdStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Defines a range of application IDs a federate can use by specifying a minimum and maximum value.

field.name: AppIdMin
field.semantics: Defines the minimum application ID a federate can use.

field.name: AppIdMax
field.semantics: Defines the maximum application ID a federate can use.

field.name: Day
field.semantics: Day of the month. 1 to 31.

field.name: Hour
field.semantics: Time of day in hours. 0 to 23.

field.name: Minute
field.semantics: Time in mInutes after the hour. 0 to 59

fixedRecordData.name: FileStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Contains information about a given file name.

field.name: FileType
field.semantics: Enum that denotes what file type is listed.

field.name: FileName
field.semantics: The file name that is null terminated.

field.name: hash
field.semantics: The value of the SHA512 cryptographic hash algorithm used on the file.

fixedRecordData.name: JLVCIsPartOfStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Defines the spatial relationship between two objects.

field.name: HostEntityIdentifier
field.semantics: The identifier of the entity of which the object is a constituent part.

field.name: HostRTIObjectIdentifier
field.semantics: The RTI instance identifier of the object of which this object is a constituent part.

field.name: Relationship
field.semantics: The relationship of the constituent part object to its host object.

fixedRecordData.name: RectangleGeometryStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Specifies the geometry of a two-dimensional rectangular area.

field.name: UpperLeftPoint
field.semantics: The upper left point of the rectangular area.

field.name: LowerRightPoint
field.semantics: The lower right point of the rectangular area.

fixedRecordData.name: PolygonGeometryStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Specifies the geometry of a two-dimensional polygonal area.

field.name: Points
field.semantics: Semantics: A list of points for a polygonal area. Minimum of three points. The final point and the first point shall not be equal.

fixedRecordData.name: CircleGeometryStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Specifies the geometry of a two-dimensional circular area.

field.name: Center
field.semantics: A single point for the center of the circle.

field.name: Radius
field.semantics: Radius of the circle in meters.

fixedRecordData.name: EllipseGeometryStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Specifies the geometry of a two-dimensional elliptical area.

field.name: Center
field.semantics: A single point for the center of the ellipse.

field.name: MajorAxis
field.semantics: Length of the ellipse’s major axis in meters.

field.name: MinorAxis
field.semantics: Length of the ellipse’s minor axis in meters.

field.name: Orientation
field.semantics: Orientation of the ellipse. This value is in radians. Orientation (0 - PI) of the major axis for an elliptic area of interest. The 0-radian value is on the y-axis at the North/12 o’clock position. As the radian value increases, it will sweep clockwise from the 0 position.

fixedRecordData.name: LatLongStruct64
fixedRecordData.semantics: A latitude and longitude pair measured in degrees with 64 bit accuracy

field.name: Latitude
field.semantics: Latitude part of the lat/lon pair

field.name: Longitude
field.semantics: Longitude part of the lat/lon pair

variantRecordData.name: Area2DVariantStruct
variantRecordData.semantics: Specifies the geometry of two-dimensional area. Geometries cannot cross the international date line.
